description_long: This is an adult woman standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top with a lace-up front and cropped pants that end just below the knees. Her shoes are flat and closed-toe, and she has no visible accessories or carried items. Her hair is styled in a short, swept-back manner, revealing her facial features clearly. The clothing appears casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. The figure's proportions and attire suggest a typical pedestrian one might encounter on city streets or sidewalks.
description: An adult woman in casual attire, standing in a T-pose with cropped pants, a sleeveless top, and flat shoes. Her hair is short and swept back, and she carries no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woman's facial features, sleeveless top with lace-up detail, and cropped pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of her face, the fit of her top, and the length of her pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of her head, the back of her top, and the rolled cuffs of her pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm, and the shape of her footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top with lace-up front and cropped casual pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
